description: Cross-print 1:1 mirror between two Unova Golett cards (National Pokedex no. 622). Same canonical clay-construct species; two distinct artists (0313 on CRE-065, Ryuta Fuse on DAA-076); two distinct iconographic registers (CRE-065 telluric subterranean grim dungeon palette versus DAA-076 cosmic galaxy-vortex sublime palette). The cross-print pair canonizes both registers of Golett's design — the chthonic ancient-construct read (grey stone, teal glow, grim mood) and the cosmic ancient-construct read (galaxy backdrop, orange glow, sublime mood) — as both legitimate within one species identity. Mirrors the wave-18 Grimer BRS-084 / DAA-100 cross-print mirror as a structural precedent for two-print same-species cohort edges.
citations: [PokemonTCG.io: swsh6-65 + swsh3-76 same species + same National Pokedex no.]
[BBL corpus: Golett DAA-076 wave 14 trivia pass — primary source for the clay-construct Golem-of-Prague + Unova-as-New-York design thesis]
other_candidates_considered: Sigilyph + Golett ancient-Unova-civilization Mr. Nodeley — defer per the 2/3 threshold caveat noted in the wave 18 Grimer sidecar; await a third member (Claydol, Yamask, or any Larvesta-era ancient-civ Unova card) before triggering the Nodeley pass.
Golett-line CRE-065 -> Golurk evolution mirror — Golurk not currently in BBL corpus; deferred.
Golett (CRE-065 + DAA-076) 1:N branch to a future _characters/golett-line or _hubs/ancient-clay-construct node — premature; cross-print mirror first, then if Golurk lands the chain can extend.
